name: HR Orientation
tagline: Modern 3D HR onboarding deck with bold blue pill headings, coral and yellow panels, chunky rounded display type, and playful people/object modules.

palette.description: white slide panels framed by coral red, vivid royal blue headers, warm yellow bands, black body text, and playful 3D-like objects

typography.style: chunky rounded display type paired with simple readable onboarding copy

best_for: HR orientation, new-hire onboarding, culture introductions, policy briefings, and internal training that should feel welcoming and memorable.
avoid_for: Board updates, luxury brand decks, legal arguments, or subtle editorial presentations.

source_inspiration.name: SlidesCarnival HR Orientation Slides
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview sequence. It keeps the blue/coral/yellow palette, rounded banner system, chunky display type, white card panels, and 3D-object inspired placeholders without reusing source illustrations or photos.
